basic_details.job_title: SAIL ISP Nursing Tutor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Steel Authority of India Limited, IISCO Steel Plant (SAIL ISP)
basic_details.short_information: The latest Steel Authority of India Limited, IISCO Steel Plant (SAIL ISP) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Nursing Tutor posts! Published at sail.co.in , this new recruitment drive offers 2 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the maximum age of 35 years and possessing a BSc (Nursing) / PB BSc (Nursing) / MSc (Nursing) or Diploma in Nursing Education & Administration with two years of professional experience can attend the walk-in interview on 28 May 2026. Find all details about the SAIL ISP Nursing Tutor 2026 vacancy, including eligibility, walk-in procedure, and notific

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: BSc (Nursing) / PB BSc (Nursing) / MSc (Nursing) OR Diploma in Nursing Education & Administration with two years of professional experience.
qualification.details: Nursing Tutor: BSc (Nursing) / PB BSc (Nursing) / MSc (Nursing) from a recognised Institute / college affiliated to Indian Nursing Council (INC)/State Nursing Council (SNRC) Diploma in Nursing Education & Administration from a recognised Institute / college affiliated to Indian Nursing Council (INC) with two years of professional experience. Candidates having relevant post qualification work experience shall be given preference.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SAIL ISP Nursing Tutor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.sail.co.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SAIL ISP Nursing Tutor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the advance copy of the application via email is 27th May 2026. The walk-in interview is scheduled for 28th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Nursing Tutor post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Nursing Tutor position at SAIL IISCO Steel Plant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Nursing Tutor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BSc (Nursing) / PB BSc (Nursing) / MSc (Nursing) or a Diploma in Nursing Education & Administration with two years of experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Nursing Tutor post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Nursing Tutor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline, and candidates need to appear for a walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Burnpur Boys High School, Near Bharati Bhawan, P.O. Burnpur, Dist.: Paschim Bardhhaman, Asansol, West Bengal -713325.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Nursing Tutor position?
faq.answer: The job is on a temporary basis for a fixed term.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all relevant educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and passport-sized photographs to the interview venue.
